LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED AT THE HEARING THAT SHE IS A MEMBER OF THE SAME INN OF COURT AS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DAVID NEWDORF. THIS WILL NOT AFFECT JUDGE MILLER'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL, AND SHE DOES NOT BELIEVE THAT A PERSON AWARE OF THE FACTS MIGHT REASONABLY ENTERTAIN A DOUBT THAT SHE WOULD BE ABLE TO BE IMPARTIAL. QUESTIONS WERE RAISED AND AFTER SOME CLARIFICATION FROM THE JUDGE, THE OBJECTION FOR THE JUDGE TO HEAR THE MATTER WAS WITHDRAWN. DEFENDANTS BRUCE G. FAGEL, A LAW CORPORATION DBA LAW OFFICES AND BRUCE G. FAGEL'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE AND TRANSFER ACTION TO THE LOS ANGELES SUPERIOR COURT - CENTRAL DISTRICT IS GRANTED UNDER CCP 395(A). BRUCE G. FAGEL RESIDES AND HAS HIS PRINCIPAL OFFICE IN LOS ANGELES. THE REQUEST FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEYS' FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,785.00 AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Off Calendar

Defendants Bruce G. Fagel, A Law Corporation Dba Law Offices And Bruce G. Fagel'S Motion To Change Venue And Transfer Action To The Los Angeles Superior Court-Central District; Req. For Reasonable Expenses And Attorneys' Fees In The Amount Of $8,785.00 Against Plaintiff'S Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID B. NEWDORF OF NEWDORF LEGAL, TEL. NO. 357-1234 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. BARRY L. COHEN, TEL. NO. (818) 981-2300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - Judge Miller disclosed at the hearing that she is a member of the same Inn of Court as Plaintiff's counsel David Newdorf. This will not affect Judge Miller's ability to be fair and impartial, and she does not believe that a person aware of the facts might reasonably entertain a doubt that she would be able to be impartial. Questions were raised and after some clarification from the judge, the objection was withdrawn for the judge to hear the matter. The matter was argued. DEFENDANTS BRUCE G. FAGEL, A LAW CORPORATION DBA LAW OFFICES and BRUCE G. FAGEL's Motion To Change Venue And Transfer Action To The Los Angeles Superior Court-Central District; Request For Reasonable Expenses And Attorneys' Fees In The Amount Of $8,785.00 Against Plaintiff's Counsel - Motion to change venue to Los Angeles Superior Court is Granted under CCP 395(a). Bruce G. Fagel resides and has his principal office in Los Angeles. The request for attorneys fees and expenses are denied. Prevailing party to prepare form of order to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976 (302)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue And Transfer Action To The Los Angeles Superior Court-Central District; Req. For Reasonable Expenses And Attorneys' Fees In The Amount Of $8,785.00 Against Pltf'S Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRUCE G. FAGEL, A LAW CORPORATION DBA LAW OFFICES AND BRUCE G. FAGEL'S MOTION To Change Venue And Transfer Action To The Los Angeles Superior Court-Central District; Req. For Reasonable Expenses And Attorneys' Fees In The Amount Of $8,785.00 Against Plaintiff'S Counsel is continued on the court's own motion to June 17, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
